name: PlantDoc
full_name: PlantDoc: A Dataset for Visual Plant Disease Detection
authors: Singh, Jain, Jain, Kayal, Kumawat, Batra et al.
description: Real-world plant leaf images with bounding-box labels, collected for farm-style conditions. Used here as the reference taxonomy and agronomic knowledge base; the in-browser model remains PlantVillage-trained until you export a PlantDoc-trained TF.js model (see dataset/tools).
notes: Hugging Face mirror stores detection annotations (image + objects.bbox + objects.category).
Classification-style folder releases (e.g. Kaggle) align closely with the same disease names.
Classes with fewer than ~50 images were dropped in the original curation.
